title: 5 Reasons to Watch the Dreamforce IT Keynote: Build and Govern the Agentic Enterprise
author: Katie Muse

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: The Agentic Enterprise represents the next evolution of how business operates, leveraging AI agents, applications, and human expertise in perfect harmony. At the heart of making this a reality for IT leaders, developers, and admins is theAgentforce 360 Platform. This year’s IT Keynote at Dreamforce,“Build and Govern the Agentic Enterprise,”is your guide to navigating this transformative landscape. Discover how Salesforce empowers IT to innovate with confidence, secure their operations, and govern their entire ecosystem. Here are five reasons to watch onSalesforce+:

sections.heading: Reason 1: Hear how a fellow Trailblazer is building and securing their agentic enterprise on Salesforce
sections.text: It’s one thing to hear about the agentic enterprise from us. It’s another to hear and see it in action from a customer. Our customer,Pearson, is a shining example of how a global organization is successfully building the agentic enterprise today. In the keynote, David Treat, CTO at Pearson shared why Pearson chose Salesforce, how they’re building their agents, applications, and workflows on the Platform, and the critical role security plays in their strategy. This is a unique opportunity to gain practical insights and real-world best practices from a peer who is truly championing this transformation.

sections.heading: Reason 2: Learn how to unlock value from your existing IT investments
sections.text: Your IT landscape consists of dozens of specialized systems, from data lakes and legacy applications to the custom tools built by various departments and teams. The challenge isn’t necessarily the systems themselves, but the silos they create. Instead of a massive “rip and replace” project, learn how our open platform works with the infrastructure you already have. In the IT Keynote, we showed howData 360(formerly Data Cloud) lets you access federated data with a zero-copy architecture, keeping your data secure in its source system while making it available for activation. You’ll also see howMuleSofttransforms your web of existing APIs into a clear set of actions, making every system and workflow instantly ready for your AI agents. Before you decide to build it all yourself, see just how easy it is to connect, build, and manage your entire IT ecosystem.

sections.heading: Reason 3: Master the tools for end-to-end governance
sections.text: Building the agentic enterprise is one thing; governing it effectively is another. Learn how the Agentforce 360 Platform provides the comprehensiveApplication and Agent Lifecycle Management (ALM)tools needed to manage your entire business process. This goes beyond security, incorporating built-in governance that includes AI code checking and agent testing. You’ll discover how to test new features and agents before deployment withDevOps Centerand theAgentforce Testing Center, monitor apps, users, and agents in production usingShield: Event MonitoringandAgentforce Observability,and ensure your apps and agents rely on the correct data at every ALM stage. You’ll also learn about agent governance with MuleSoft Agent Fabric for multi-agent processes.

sections.heading: Reason 4:Learn how to build an unshakable security foundation for your AI-powered enterprise
sections.text: AI allows you to be incredibly productive and innovate faster than ever before. But this new technology also dramatically expands your attack surface.In an era of increasingly sophisticated cyber threats, security is the bedrock of trust. In the IT keynote, we discussed the evolving threat landscape and how Salesforce’s security layers provide an unparalleled approach to platform security. We also shared hownew agentic capabilties in Security Center and Privacy Centerhelp you turn manual, time-consuming security and compliance tasks into a simple, automated experience. If you want to go deeper on this topic, check out theDreamforce Security Keynote, “Protecting the Agentic Enterprise,”. You’ll get a detailed breakdown of our security framework, learn actionable best practices, and see the latest product innovations designed to protect your data in the age of AI.

sections.heading: Reason 5: Unlock the deeply unified platform for IT
sections.text: Beyond individual innovations, the IT Keynote showcased the overarching power of the Agentforce 360 Platform itself. Learn why Salesforce is recognized across DevOps, low code, no code, and beyond, providing the comprehensive tools you need to balance innovation with security, all while accelerating the delivery of the agentic enterprise. Want more from Dreamforce 2025? OurIT Series on Salesforce+includes sessions from Platform, Heroku, and Mulesoft. Check it out to see the lastest innovations in agentic AI and how IT Trailblazers are solving their toughest challenges with the help of Salesforce.

raw_html:
The Agentic Enterprise represents the next evolution of how business operates, leveraging AI agents, applications, and human expertise in perfect harmony. At the heart of making this a reality for IT leaders, developers, and admins is the Agentforce 360 Platform.

This year’s IT Keynote at Dreamforce, “Build and Govern the Agentic Enterprise,” is your guide to navigating this transformative landscape. Discover how Salesforce empowers IT to innovate with confidence, secure their operations, and govern their entire ecosystem.

Here are five reasons to watch on Salesforce+:

Reason 1: Hear how a fellow Trailblazer is building and securing their agentic enterprise on Salesforce

It’s one thing to hear about the agentic enterprise from us. It’s another to hear and see it in action from a customer. Our customer, Pearson, is a shining example of how a global organization is successfully building the agentic enterprise today. 

In the keynote, David Treat, CTO at Pearson shared why Pearson chose Salesforce, how they’re building their agents, applications, and workflows on the Platform, and the critical role security plays in their strategy. This is a unique opportunity to gain practical insights and real-world best practices from a peer who is truly championing this transformation. 

Reason 2: Learn how to unlock value from your existing IT investments

Your IT landscape consists of dozens of specialized systems, from data lakes and legacy applications to the custom tools built by various departments and teams. The challenge isn’t necessarily the systems themselves, but the silos they create. 

Instead of a massive “rip and replace” project, learn how our open platform works with the infrastructure you already have. In the IT Keynote, we showed how Data 360 (formerly Data Cloud) lets you access federated data with a zero-copy architecture, keeping your data secure in its source system while making it available for activation. You’ll also see how MuleSoft transforms your web of existing APIs into a clear set of actions, making every system and workflow instantly ready for your AI agents. Before you decide to build it all yourself, see just how easy it is to connect, build, and manage your entire IT ecosystem.

Reason 3: Master the tools for end-to-end governance 

Building the agentic enterprise is one thing; governing it effectively is another. Learn how the Agentforce 360 Platform provides the comprehensive Application and Agent Lifecycle Management (ALM) tools needed to manage your entire business process. This goes beyond security, incorporating built-in governance that includes AI code checking and agent testing.

You’ll discover how to test new features and agents before deployment with DevOps Center and the Agentforce Testing Center, monitor apps, users, and agents in production using Shield: Event Monitoring and Agentforce Observability, and ensure your apps and agents rely on the correct data at every ALM stage. You’ll also learn about agent governance with MuleSoft Agent Fabric for multi-agent processes.

Reason 4: Learn how to build an unshakable security foundation for your AI-powered enterprise

AI allows you to be incredibly productive and innovate faster than ever before. But this new technology also dramatically expands your attack surface.

In an era of increasingly sophisticated cyber threats, security is the bedrock of trust. In the IT keynote, we discussed the evolving threat landscape and how Salesforce’s security layers provide an unparalleled approach to platform security. We also shared how new agentic capabilties in Security Center and Privacy Center help you turn manual, time-consuming security and compliance tasks into a simple, automated experience.

If you want to go deeper on this topic, check out the Dreamforce Security Keynote, “Protecting the Agentic Enterprise,”. You’ll get a detailed breakdown of our security framework, learn actionable best practices, and see the latest product innovations designed to protect your data in the age of AI.

Reason 5: Unlock the deeply unified platform for IT

Beyond individual innovations, the IT Keynote showcased the overarching power of the Agentforce 360 Platform itself. Learn why Salesforce is recognized across DevOps, low code, no code, and beyond, providing the comprehensive tools you need to balance innovation with security, all while accelerating the delivery of the agentic enterprise. 

Want more from Dreamforce 2025? Our IT Series on Salesforce+ includes sessions from Platform, Heroku, and Mulesoft. Check it out to see the lastest innovations in agentic AI and how IT Trailblazers are solving their toughest challenges with the help of Salesforce.
